name: Morris Stoloff
abstract: Morris W. Stoloff (August 1, 1898 – April 16, 1980) was an American composer.

about_quotes.speaker: Skitch Henderson
about_quotes.evidence: I played piano on a date for Morris, something that Ernst Toch had written
about_quotes.doc_title: Skitch Henderson interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Milford, Connecticut, October 31, 1998
